title: Go port/config/service availability local parity candidate

evidence.port_config: preferred_port, fallback_enabled, fallback_range, and current_port are served and persisted to the copied data root .port_config
evidence.startup_preference: auto_open_browser marker files are read/written under the copied data root
evidence.service_availability: Go candidate returns a safe restart acknowledgement and explicitly reports service restart unavailable without calling systemctl

boundaries: Does not actually restart host services.
Does not promote production/default server ops ownership.
Does not deploy Pi, edit Caddy/systemd, change frontend defaults, touch production DB/files, remove Python, or expand public exposure.
